injuries.comment: The Canucks said that Pettersson is Doubtful for Thursday's (Dec. 11) game versus the Sabres.
The Canucks reported that Boeser is a game-time decision for Thursday's (Dec. 11) game versus the Sabres.
The sabres said that Norris is OUT for Thusday's (Dec. 11) game versus the Canucks.
